"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\QTQuant.dir/objects.a
D:\code\Qt6.5.3\Tools\mingw1120_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\QTQuant.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\QTQuant.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\code\Qt6.5.3\Tools\mingw1120_64\bin\g++.exe  -finput-charset=UTF-8 -fexec-charset=UTF-8 -g -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\QTQuant.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o QTQuant.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libQTQuant.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\QTQuant.dir\linkLibs.rsp
